steps.title: Write the area equation
steps.content:
Let $h$ be the height. The base is $10$ centimeters greater, so the base is $h+10$. Substitute into the triangle area formula.
$$300=\frac{1}{2}h(h+10)$$

steps.title: Solve for the positive height
steps.content:
Multiply by $2$, then factor.
$$600=h(h+10)$$
$$h^2+10h-600=0$$
$$(h+30)(h-20)=0$$
The positive solution is $h=20$. The answer is B.
